name: Alliance Gold and Silver Exchange
description_short: Fort Worth-based precious metals buyer that purchases gold, silver, jewelry, coins, and diamonds for cash. Local in-person transactions only with nearly 40 years of combined industry experience.
description_long:
Alliance Gold & Silver Exchange is a Fort Worth, Texas-based precious metals and jewelry buyer operating from a single location at 2901 Western Center Blvd. The company positions itself as one of the DFW Metroplex's largest buyers of gold, silver, jewelry, and collectible coins. Founded on principles of customer trust and fair evaluation, the business emphasizes its nearly 40 combined years of experience among its team of jewelry and coin experts.

The company buys and sells a wide range of precious metals and keepsakes including gold jewelry (scrap, broken, or high quality), silver, diamonds, estate jewelry, dental gold, bullion bars and coins, rare coins, US proof and mint sets, sterling silver flatware, and various collectible coins such as Morgan Dollars and Peace Dollars. They explicitly state they provide honest evaluations and competitive pricing based on current market spot prices. The business operates as a traditional pawn-shop model focused specifically on precious metals rather than general merchandise.

Alliance differentiates itself through emphasis on local expertise, customer testimonials highlighting trust and fair dealing, and transparent pricing tied to real-time precious metals market data. They position themselves against online sellers and disreputable competitors, promoting their physical location as a safe and secure place to transact. The company maintains active social media presence and publishes educational content about selling precious metals.

A significant limitation is geographic: the company explicitly states they cannot buy or sell nationwide and only serve customers who visit their Fort Worth location in person. There is no mail-in service, online valuation tool, or shipping option mentioned. The business model is entirely dependent on walk-in customer traffic to a single physical location.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Nearly 40 combined years of team experience in jewelry and coin evaluation
Real-time spot price updates displayed on website ensuring transparent market-based pricing
Wide variety of accepted items: gold, silver, jewelry, coins, bullion, diamonds, estate pieces, dental gold, flatware
Physical storefront location provides in-person security and face-to-face evaluation
Multiple positive customer testimonials emphasizing fair valuations and trustworthy service
Located conveniently off I-35W on Western Center Boulevard in Fort Worth
Specializes specifically in precious metals rather than general pawn merchandise
cons: Local-only business model with no online purchasing, mail-in service, or nationwide shipping capability
Single physical location limits accessibility for customers outside Fort Worth area
No mention of instant online quotes or preliminary valuations before in-person visits
Website contains future-dated news articles (April 2026) suggesting outdated or placeholder content
Limited transparency on specific buyback percentages, fees, or margin structure
best_for: Fort Worth and DFW area residents looking to sell unwanted jewelry, gold, or silver for immediate cash
Estate liquidators and jewelry holders seeking fair local evaluation without shipping risk
Collectors of rare coins, bullion, or precious metal items wanting expert appraisal
diagnosis: Best for Fort Worth-area residents with unwanted gold, silver, jewelry, or coins who can visit the physical location and want fair market evaluation from experienced local evaluators. The main caveat is strict geographic limitation—this business only operates from one Fort Worth location with no mail-in, online, or nationwide service options, making it inaccessible for anyone unable to visit in person.
services: Gold jewelry purchase (scrap, broken, or fine quality pieces)
Diamond and estate jewelry evaluation and purchase
Rare coin and collectible coin buying (Morgan Dollars, Peace Dollars, US Proof Sets)
Sterling silver flatware and serving sets buying
In-person fair market valuation and appraisal
Real-time precious metals spot price information
Safe and secure in-person transaction environment
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2901 Western Center Blvd #120, Fort Worth, TX 76131
